question: Add the official Ansible PPA repository to your Ubuntu system using apt-add-repository.
hint: Use the command: sudo apt-add-repository ppa:ansible/ansible -y
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
if grep -r "ppa:ansible/ansible" /etc/apt/sources.list.d/ > /dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi

question: Update the package list to include the newly added Ansible PPA.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
if apt-cache policy ansible | grep -q "Candidate:"; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi

question: Install the ansible package from the PPA.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
if command -v ansible > /dev/null 2>&1 && ansible --version > /dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi

question: Verify that ansible is installed correctly by checking its version.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
if ansible --version > /dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi

question: Verify that ansible-playbook is installed correctly by checking its version.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
if ansible-playbook --version > /dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi

question: Verify that ansible-galaxy is installed correctly by checking its version.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
if ansible-galaxy --version > /dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi
